detail: Mean 95% CI width in log-duration space across 118 strata
8 critical + 23 moderate triggers in this batch
Future-observation metric: sequential LOO at sqrt(var_post+var_obs)
Audit only: parameter SD coverage; NOT used for future-observation scoring
KRS = 1 - (7/166). Degraded: 2 prototypes (trust<0.5), 5 duration strata (CI grew >20% or critical trigger)
Composite U = 0.3*s_drift(0.357) + 0.25*s_calib(0.545) + 0.2*s_unc(0.000) + 0.15*s_trust(0.213) + 0.1*s_trig(0.800). All s_c are normalised to [0,1]; label based on normalised scale.
